info.title: Financial Datasets API
info.description: Stock market API with real-time and historical financial data for 30,000+ tickers over 30+ years. Financial statements, equity prices, insider trades, SEC filings, and more.

tags.name: Financial Statements
tags.description: Access to income statements, balance sheets, and cash flow statements

tags.name: Company Information
tags.description: Company facts like ticker, name, and description

tags.name: Earnings
tags.description: Earnings press releases and related data

tags.name: Crypto
tags.description: Cryptocurrency price data and market information

tags.name: Financial Metrics
tags.description: Financial ratios, metrics, and key performance indicators

post.description: Search for specific financial metrics across income statements, balance sheets, and cash flow statements for a list of tickers.

get.description: Get insider trades like buys and sells for a ticker by a company insider.

parameters.name: ticker
parameters.description: The ticker symbol of the company.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of transactions to return (default: 10).

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Filter by insider name (e.g., 'Jen Hsun Huang'). Use the /insider-trades/names endpoint to get available names for a ticker.

parameters.name: transaction_type
parameters.description: Filter by transaction type (e.g., 'Open market sale', 'Gift'). Use the /insider-trades/transaction-types endpoint to get available types.

parameters.name: filing_date
parameters.description: Filter by exact filing date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

parameters.name: filing_date_gte
parameters.description: Filter by filing date greater than or equal to this date (YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: filing_date_lte
parameters.description: Filter by filing date less than or equal to this date (YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: filing_date_gt
parameters.description: Filter by filing date greater than this date (YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: filing_date_lt
parameters.description: Filter by filing date less than this date (YYYY-MM-DD).

get.summary: Get the equity holdings of an investment manager
get.description: Get institutional ownership by investor or ticker. Requires either investor or ticker parameter, but not both.

parameters.name: investor
parameters.description: The name of the investment manager

parameters.name: ticker
parameters.description: The ticker symbol, if queried by investor.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of holdings to return (default: 10).

get.description: Get company facts for a ticker.

parameters.name: ticker
parameters.description: The ticker symbol.

parameters.name: cik
parameters.description: The CIK of the company.

get.description: Get SEC filings for a company.

parameters.name: cik
parameters.description: The Central Index Key (CIK) of the company.

parameters.name: ticker
parameters.description: The ticker symbol.

parameters.name: filing_type
parameters.description: Filter by one or more filing types. Repeat the query parameter to pass multiple values (e.g. filing_type=10-Q&filing_type=10-K).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of filings to return (default: 10).

get.description: Get the raw text Items from an SEC filing.

parameters.name: ticker
parameters.description: The ticker symbol.

parameters.name: filing_type
parameters.description: The type of filing.

parameters.name: year
parameters.description: The year of the filing.

parameters.name: quarter
parameters.description: The quarter of the filing if 10-Q.

parameters.name: item
parameters.description: The item to get.

parameters.name: accession_number
parameters.description: The accession number of the filing if 8-K.

parameters.name: include_exhibits
parameters.description: Whether to include the raw text from linked exhibits. Only applicable for 8-K filings. When true, exhibit objects will include the 'text' field containing the full exhibit content.

parameters.name: ticker
parameters.description: The ticker symbol. Required if cik is not provided.

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: The date or time period to which the reported revenue data relates in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of revenue statements to return.

parameters.name: cik
parameters.description: The Central Index Key (CIK) of the company.

get.description: Get income statements for a ticker.

parameters.name: ticker
parameters.description: The ticker symbol. Required if cik is not provided.

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: The time period of the income statements.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of income statements to return.

parameters.name: cik
parameters.description: The Central Index Key (CIK) of the company.

get.description: Get balance sheets for a ticker.

parameters.name: ticker
parameters.description: The ticker symbol. Required if cik is not provided.

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: The time period of the balance sheets.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of balance sheets to return

parameters.name: cik
parameters.description: The Central Index Key (CIK) of the company.

get.description: Get cash flow statements for a ticker.

parameters.name: ticker
parameters.description: The ticker symbol. Required if cik is not provided.

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: The time period of the cash flow statements.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of cash flow statements to return.

parameters.name: cik
parameters.description: The Central Index Key (CIK) of the company.

get.description: Get earnings press releases for a ticker.

parameters.name: ticker
parameters.description: The ticker symbol.

get.description: Get the real-time price snapshot for a stock, including the current price, day change, and day change percent.

parameters.name: ticker
parameters.description: The stock ticker symbol (e.g. AAPL, MSFT).

get.description: Get all financial statements for a ticker.

parameters.name: ticker
parameters.description: The ticker symbol. Required if cik is not provided.

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: The time period of the financial statements.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of financial statements to return.

parameters.name: cik
parameters.description: The Central Index Key (CIK) of the company.

get.description: Get recent news articles for a specific company or the broad market. Pass a ticker for company-specific news, or omit the ticker for general market news. Articles are sourced from RSS feeds of publishers like The Motley Fool, Investing.com, Reuters, and more.

parameters.name: ticker
parameters.description: The ticker symbol of the company. Omit for broad market news.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of news articles to return (default: 5, max: 10).

get.description: Get end-of-day (EOD) historical price data for stocks.

parameters.name: ticker
parameters.description: The stock ticker symbol (e.g. AAPL, MSFT).

parameters.name: interval
parameters.description: The time interval for the price data.

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: The start date for the price data (format: YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: The end date for the price data (format: YYYY-MM-DD).

get.description: Get financial metrics for a ticker, including valuation, profitability, efficiency, liquidity, leverage, growth, and per share metrics.

parameters.name: ticker
parameters.description: The ticker symbol of the company. Required if cik is not provided.

parameters.name: cik
parameters.description: The Central Index Key (CIK) of the company. Can be used instead of ticker.

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: The time period for the financial data.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of results to return.

200.description: The historical financial metrics and ratios for a ticker

get.description: Get the real-time financial metrics snapshot for a stock, including valuation ratios, profitability, efficiency, liquidity, leverage, growth, and per share metrics.

parameters.name: ticker
parameters.description: The ticker symbol of the company.

parameters.name: cik
parameters.description: The Central Index Key (CIK) of the company. Can be used instead of ticker.

post.description: Search for stocks by filtering across financial metrics from income statements, balance sheets, and cash flow statements.

get.description: Get the most recent earnings snapshot for a ticker. Optional estimate/surprise and change fields are returned only when available.

parameters.name: ticker
parameters.description: The ticker symbol.

period.description: The time period for the financial data.

limit.description: The maximum number of results to return.

order_by.description: The field to order the results by.  Use -field to order in descending order.

currency.description: The currency of the financial data.

historical.description: Whether to return historical financial data.

field.description: The criteria to filter on.  For financial metric fields, use 'gt', 'lt', 'gte', 'lte', 'eq' operators.  For 'ticker' and 'cik' fields, use the 'in' operator to filter against multiple values.

operator.description: The comparison operator. The 'in' operator can only be used with a field value of 'ticker' or 'cik' and lets you filter against multiple values.

oneOf.description: The value to compare against for single-value operators (gt, lt, gte, lte, eq)
Array of ticker or cik values to compare against when using the 'in' operator

filters.description: An array of filter objects to apply to the search.

items.description: The financial metric to search for.

line_items.description: An array of line items to apply to the search.

tickers.description: An array of tickers to apply to the search.

period.description: The time period for the financial data.

limit.description: The maximum number of results to return.

ticker.description: The ticker symbol of the company.

report_period.description: The reporting period of the financial data.

period.description: The time period of the financial data.

currency.description: The currency of the financial data.

additionalProperties.description: Additional financial metrics based on the search criteria.

ticker.description: The ticker symbol of the company.

cik.description: The Central Index Key (CIK) of the company.

accession_number.description: The accession number of the filing.

next_page_url.description: The URL to the next page of results.

ticker.description: The ticker symbol of the company.

issuer.description: The name of the issuing company.

is_board_director.description: Whether the insider is a board director.

transaction_shares.description: The number of shares involved in the transaction.

transaction_price_per_share.description: The price per share in the transaction.

transaction_value.description: The total value of the transaction.

shares_owned_before_transaction.description: The number of shares owned before the transaction.

shares_owned_after_transaction.description: The number of shares owned after the transaction.

security_title.description: The title of the security involved in the transaction.

filing_date.description: The date the transaction was filed.

ticker.description: The ticker symbol, if queried by investor.

investor.description: The investor name, if queried by ticker.

report_period.description: The reporting period of the institutional ownership.

price.description: The estimated purchase price of the equity position.

shares.description: The number of shares held by the investment manager.

market_value.description: The market value of the equity position.

report_period.description: The reporting period of the revenue.

period.description: The time period of the revenue.

items.description: An array of revenue segments from SEC filings (10-Ks and 10-Qs) in XBRL format

name.description: The name of the revenue segment.

amount.description: The numerical amount reported for the specified financial metric, expressed in the company's reporting currency; default is USD.

end_period.description: The end period of the revenue segment.  Only provided for quarterly data.

start_period.description: The start period of the revenue segment.  Only provided for quarterly data.

label.description: The label for the revenue segment.

report_period.description: The reporting period of the income statement.

fiscal_period.description: The fiscal period of the income statement.

period.description: The time period of the income statement.

currency.description: The currency in which the financial data is reported.

revenue.description: The total revenue of the company.

cost_of_revenue.description: The cost of revenue of the company.

gross_profit.description: The gross profit of the company.

operating_expense.description: The operating expenses of the company.

selling_general_and_administrative_expen.description: The selling, general, and administrative expenses of the company.

research_and_development.description: The research and development expenses of the company.

operating_income.description: The operating income of the company.

interest_expense.description: The interest expenses of the company.

ebit.description: The earnings before interest and taxes of the company.

income_tax_expense.description: The income tax expenses of the company.

net_income_discontinued_operations.description: The net income from discontinued operations of the company.

net_income_non_controlling_interests.description: The net income from non-controlling interests of the company.

net_income.description: The net income of the company.

net_income_common_stock.description: The net income available to common stockholders of the company.

preferred_dividends_impact.description: The impact of preferred dividends on the net income of the company.

consolidated_income.description: The consolidated income of the company.

earnings_per_share.description: The earnings per share of the company.

earnings_per_share_diluted.description: The diluted earnings per share of the company.

dividends_per_common_share.description: The dividends per common share of the company.

weighted_average_shares.description: The weighted average shares of the company.

weighted_average_shares_diluted.description: The diluted weighted average shares of the company.

report_period.description: The reporting period of the balance sheet.

fiscal_period.description: The fiscal period of the balance sheet.

period.description: The time period of the balance sheet.

currency.description: The currency in which the financial data is reported.

total_assets.description: The total assets of the company.

current_assets.description: The current assets of the company.

cash_and_equivalents.description: The cash and equivalents of the company.

current_investments.description: The current investments of the company.

trade_and_non_trade_receivables.description: The trade and non-trade receivables of the company.

non_current_assets.description: The non-current assets of the company.

property_plant_and_equipment.description: The property, plant, and equipment of the company.

goodwill_and_intangible_assets.description: The goodwill and intangible assets of the company.

non_current_investments.description: The non-current investments of the company.

outstanding_shares.description: The outstanding shares of the company.

tax_assets.description: The tax assets of the company.

total_liabilities.description: The total liabilities of the company.

current_liabilities.description: The current liabilities of the company.

current_debt.description: The current debt of the company.

trade_and_non_trade_payables.description: The trade and non-trade payables of the company.

deferred_revenue.description: The deferred revenue of the company.

deposit_liabilities.description: The deposit liabilities of the company.

non_current_liabilities.description: The non-current liabilities of the company.

non_current_debt.description: The non-current debt of the company.

tax_liabilities.description: The tax liabilities of the company.

shareholders_equity.description: The shareholders' equity of the company.

retained_earnings.description: The retained earnings of the company.

accumulated_other_comprehensive_income.description: The accumulated other comprehensive income of the company.

total_debt.description: The total debt of the company.

report_period.description: The reporting period of the cash flow statement.

fiscal_period.description: The fiscal period of the cash flow statement.

period.description: The time period of the cash flow statement.

currency.description: The currency in which the financial data is reported.

net_income.description: The net income of the company.

depreciation_and_amortization.description: The depreciation and amortization of the company.

share_based_compensation.description: The share-based compensation of the company.

net_cash_flow_from_operations.description: The net cash flow from operations of the company.

capital_expenditure.description: The capital expenditure of the company.

business_acquisitions_and_disposals.description: The business acquisitions and disposals of the company.

investment_acquisitions_and_disposals.description: The investment acquisitions and disposals of the company.

net_cash_flow_from_investing.description: The net cash flow from investing of the company.

issuance_or_repayment_of_debt_securities.description: The issuance or repayment of debt securities of the company.

issuance_or_purchase_of_equity_shares.description: The issuance or purchase of equity shares of the company.

dividends_and_other_cash_distributions.description: The dividends and other cash distributions of the company.

net_cash_flow_from_financing.description: The net cash flow from financing of the company.

change_in_cash_and_equivalents.description: The change in cash and equivalents of the company.

effect_of_exchange_rate_changes.description: The effect of exchange rate changes of the company.

ending_cash_balance.description: The ending cash balance of the company.

free_cash_flow.description: The free cash flow of the company.

ticker.description: The ticker symbol of the company.

cik.description: The Central Index Key (CIK) of the company.

is_active.description: Whether the company is currently active.

listing_date.description: The date the company was listed on the stock exchange.

market_cap.description: The market capitalization of the company.

number_of_employees.description: The number of employees at the company.

sec_filings_url.description: The URL of the company's SEC filings.

sic_code.description: The Standard Industrial Classification (SIC) code of the company.

sic_industry.description: The industry of the company based on the SIC code.

sic_sector.description: The sector of the company based on the SIC code.

website_url.description: The URL of the company's website.

weighted_average_shares.description: The weighted average shares of the company.

cik.description: The Central Index Key (CIK) of the company.

accession_number.description: The accession number of the filing.

filing_type.description: The type of the SEC filing (e.g., 10-Q, 8-K).

url.description: The URL of the SEC filing.

ticker.description: The ticker symbol of the company.

title.description: The title of the press release.

url.description: The URL of the press release.

date.description: The date the press release was published.

text.description: The full text of the press release.

price.description: The current price of the stock.

day_change.description: The price change since the previous trading day's close.

day_change_percent.description: The percentage price change since the previous trading day's close.

market_cap.description: The market capitalization of the company.

time.description: The timestamp of the price snapshot in human-readable format in UTC.

time_milliseconds.description: The timestamp of the price snapshot in milliseconds since epoch.

price.description: The current price of the cryptocurrency.

day_change.description: The price change over the last 24 hours.

day_change_percent.description: The percentage price change over the last 24 hours.

time.description: The timestamp of the price snapshot in human-readable format in UTC.

title.description: The title of the news article.

author.description: The author of the news article.

source.description: The source of the news article.

date.description: The date the news article was published.

url.description: The URL of the news article.

sentiment.description: The sentiment of the news article.

open.description: The open price of the ticker in the given time period.

close.description: The close price of the ticker in the given time period.

high.description: The high price of the ticker in the given time period.

low.description: The low price of the ticker in the given time period.

volume.description: The volume of the ticker in the given time period.

time.description: The human-readable time format of the price in UTC.

time_milliseconds.description: The timestamp of the price in milliseconds since epoch.

ticker.description: The ticker symbol of the company.

market_cap.description: The market capitalization of the company.

enterprise_value.description: The total value of the company (market cap + debt - cash).

gross_margin.description: Gross profit as a percentage of revenue.

operating_margin.description: Operating income as a percentage of revenue.

net_margin.description: Net income as a percentage of revenue.

return_on_equity.description: Net income as a percentage of shareholders' equity.

return_on_assets.description: Net income as a percentage of total assets.

return_on_invested_capital.description: Net operating profit after taxes as a percentage of invested capital.

asset_turnover.description: Revenue divided by average total assets.

inventory_turnover.description: Cost of goods sold divided by average inventory.

receivables_turnover.description: Revenue divided by average accounts receivable.

days_sales_outstanding.description: Average accounts receivable divided by revenue over the period.

working_capital_turnover.description: Revenue divided by average working capital.

current_ratio.description: Current assets divided by current liabilities.

quick_ratio.description: Quick assets divided by current liabilities.

cash_ratio.description: Cash and cash equivalents divided by current liabilities.

operating_cash_flow_ratio.description: Operating cash flow divided by current liabilities.

debt_to_equity.description: Total debt divided by shareholders' equity.

debt_to_assets.description: Total debt divided by total assets.

earnings_per_share_growth.description: Growth in earnings per share over the period.

free_cash_flow_growth.description: Growth in free cash flow over the period.

operating_income_growth.description: Growth in operating income over the period.

ebitda_growth.description: Growth in EBITDA over the period.

payout_ratio.description: Dividends paid as a percentage of net income.

earnings_per_share.description: Net income divided by weighted average shares outstanding.

book_value_per_share.description: Shareholders' equity divided by shares outstanding.

free_cash_flow_per_share.description: Free cash flow divided by shares outstanding.

fiscal_period.description: The fiscal period of the analyst estimate.

period.description: The period of the analyst estimate.

estimated_revenue.description: Estimated revenue. Returned only when available.

revenue_surprise.description: Revenue surprise classification versus estimate. Returned only when available.

estimated_earnings_per_share.description: Estimated earnings per share. Returned only when available.

eps_surprise.description: EPS surprise classification versus estimate. Returned only when available.

revenue_chg.description: Percentage change in revenue. QoQ in quarterly payload and YoY in annual payload. Returned only when calculable.

net_income_chg.description: Percentage change in net income. QoQ in quarterly payload and YoY in annual payload. Returned only when calculable.

operating_income_chg.description: Percentage change in operating income. QoQ in quarterly payload and YoY in annual payload. Returned only when calculable.

gross_profit_chg.description: Percentage change in gross profit. QoQ in quarterly payload and YoY in annual payload. Returned only when calculable.

net_cash_flow_from_operations_chg.description: Percentage change in net cash flow from operations. QoQ in quarterly payload and YoY in annual payload. Returned only when calculable.

net_cash_flow_from_investing_chg.description: Percentage change in net cash flow from investing. QoQ in quarterly payload and YoY in annual payload. Returned only when calculable.

net_cash_flow_from_financing_chg.description: Percentage change in net cash flow from financing. QoQ in quarterly payload and YoY in annual payload. Returned only when calculable.

free_cash_flow_chg.description: Percentage change in free cash flow. QoQ in quarterly payload and YoY in annual payload. Returned only when calculable.

report_period.description: Most recent report period found for the ticker.

value.description: Beta coefficient of stock monthly returns vs benchmark monthly returns.

benchmark.description: Benchmark ticker used for beta calculation.

n_observations.description: Number of overlapping monthly observations used.

r_squared.description: Coefficient of determination for the OLS fit.

price_type.description: Price type used to compute returns.

reason.description: Present when value is null due to insufficient or invalid input data.

ticker.description: The ticker symbol of the company.

market_cap.description: The total market capitalization (stock price × shares outstanding).

enterprise_value.description: The total value of the company (market cap + debt - cash).

gross_margin.description: Gross profit as a percentage of revenue.

operating_margin.description: Operating income as a percentage of revenue.

net_margin.description: Net income as a percentage of revenue.

return_on_equity.description: Net income as a percentage of shareholders' equity.

return_on_assets.description: Net income as a percentage of total assets.

return_on_invested_capital.description: Net operating profit after taxes as a percentage of invested capital.

asset_turnover.description: Revenue divided by average total assets.

inventory_turnover.description: Cost of goods sold divided by average inventory.

receivables_turnover.description: Revenue divided by average accounts receivable.

days_sales_outstanding.description: Average accounts receivable divided by revenue over the period.

working_capital_turnover.description: Revenue divided by average working capital.

current_ratio.description: Current assets divided by current liabilities.

quick_ratio.description: Quick assets divided by current liabilities.

cash_ratio.description: Cash and cash equivalents divided by current liabilities.

operating_cash_flow_ratio.description: Operating cash flow divided by current liabilities.

debt_to_equity.description: Total debt divided by shareholders' equity.

debt_to_assets.description: Total debt divided by total assets.

earnings_per_share_growth.description: Growth in earnings per share over the period.

free_cash_flow_growth.description: Growth in free cash flow over the period.

operating_income_growth.description: Growth in operating income over the period.

ebitda_growth.description: Growth in EBITDA over the period.

payout_ratio.description: Dividends paid as a percentage of net income.

earnings_per_share.description: Net income divided by weighted average shares outstanding.

book_value_per_share.description: Shareholders' equity divided by shares outstanding.

free_cash_flow_per_share.description: Free cash flow divided by shares outstanding.

segment.description: Breakdowns by business or operating segment.

SegmentMetadata.description: Common metadata fields for all segment responses.

fiscal_period.description: The fiscal period (e.g., Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4, FY).

currency.description: The reporting currency (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP).

revenue.description: Revenue broken down by product and/or segment.

operating_income.description: Operating income broken down by segment.

long_lived_assets.description: Long-lived assets broken down by segment.

capital_expenditure.description: Capital expenditure broken down by segment.

income_statement.description: Income statement segment breakdowns for this period.

balance_sheet.description: Balance sheet segment breakdowns for this period.

cash_flow_statement.description: Cash flow statement segment breakdowns for this period.

url.description: The URL to the exhibit document on the SEC website.

text.description: The raw text content of the exhibit. Only included when 'include_exhibits' parameter is set to true.

bank.description: The symbol of the central bank.

name.description: The name of the central bank.

rate.description: The interest rate of the central bank.

date.description: The date of the interest rate in YYYY-MM-DD format.

unit.description: Unit of measure (e.g., %, cents, dollars, miles, count).

period.description: Reporting period (e.g., Q4 2025, FY 2025, or a date like 2025-04-30 for non-standard fiscal years).

period_type.description: Whether this is a quarterly or annual figure.

segment.description: Business segment, geography, or sub-category. Only present when the metric is reported for a sub-unit rather than the consolidated entity.

yoy_value.description: Year-over-year comparison value from the prior period.

source_text.description: The source text span from the filing where this value was found.

source_url.description: Direct link to the SEC filing. When available, includes a text fragment that highlights the source in the browser.

point_estimate.description: Single-point guidance when no range is given.

raw_text.description: Original guidance text from the filing.

change_direction.description: Direction: raised, lowered, maintained, initiated, withdrawn.

gaap_equivalent.description: The GAAP line item this metric adjusts.

NotFoundError.description: The specified resource was not found

PaymentRequiredError.description: The request requires a paid subscription

example.message: This endpoint requires a paid subscription. Please upgrade your plan.

ReportPeriod.name: report_period
ReportPeriod.description: Filter by exact report period date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

ReportPeriodGte.name: report_period_gte
ReportPeriodGte.description: Filter by report period greater than or equal to date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

ReportPeriodLte.name: report_period_lte
ReportPeriodLte.description: Filter by report period less than or equal to date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

ReportPeriodGt.name: report_period_gt
ReportPeriodGt.description: Filter by report period greater than date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

ReportPeriodLt.name: report_period_lt
ReportPeriodLt.description: Filter by report period less than date in YYYY-MM-DD format.
